abilities.name: Convoy Law
abilities.text: Once per round, when you secure a contract lead from a live lane, you can steady the whole convoy spine and bleed pressure off the breach.

abilities.name: Old Oaths
abilities.text: Your authority still means something when frightened crews need a route called fast.

abilities.name: Chain Signal
abilities.text: A cleared transport lane stays useful longer when you are the one who locked its sequence in place.

abilities.name: Fleet Memory
abilities.text: You read convoy pressure like weather and treat panic as something that can still be ordered.
